title: Xmas Stuffed Animal Dog Plush Pillow 10" Merry Christmas Plush Toy with Santa Hat Kawaii Dog Soft Toys for Kids Girls Boys 25CM
features: 【Creative Design】 Dog plush toy with a cute expression design, wearing a Christmas hat, with "Merry Christmas" embroidered on the belly, no one can resist its charm. When you see the Christmas puppy plush toy, all bad emotions and work stress will charm away!
【High Quality】Our cute dog plush is made of super soft PP cotton, the hand feels delicate comfortable, and non-toxic, giving you a better skin touch feeling.
【Wonderful Gift】 This kawaii puppy plush toy can decorate a Christmas party or be sent to family, children, friends, etc. Those who receive this special puppy plush will feel so satisfied.
【Multi-purpose】 The dog plushies appeal to all ages. It can be used as a hugging or back pillow. It will be a nice choice for you to decorate your room, or office with it.
【Warm Tips】 After you open the vacuum package, please flap the cotton loose. Leave it for 1-2 days to make your plush doll fuller. Please hand wash or machine wash in cold water on a gentle cycle.
description: Xfrog Xmas Stuffed Animal Dog Plush Pillow 10" Merry Christmas Plush Toy with Santa Hat Kawaii Dog Soft Toys Christmas Gifts for Kids Girls Boys 25CM
